active_ingredients.name: Bispyribac Sodium
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: ALS inhibitor absorbed through leaves, stops amino acid synthesis in grassy weeds

active_ingredients.name: Bensulfuron Methyl
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: ALS inhibitor absorbed through roots and leaves, controls sedges and broadleaf weeds

mode_of_action_summary: Blocks ALS enzyme in weeds, stopping amino acid formation and cell division, leading to weed death in 7–14 days.

weather_conditions.ideal_condition: Moist soil with no deep standing water

crop_safety.selectivity_reason: Rice metabolizes the herbicide safely at recommended dose
crop_safety.overdose_effect: Crop yellowing or temporary growth suppression

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Do not use repeatedly in the same field season after season. Rotate with herbicides of different mode of action.

protective_measures: Avoid spray drift to nearby crops

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place

farmer_benefits: Controls grasses, sedges and broadleaf weeds in one spray

frequently_asked_questions.question: When should we apply Winsta?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Apply 15–25 days after transplanting when weeds are at 2–4 leaf stage.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can we spray in standing water?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: No, drain water before spray and reflood after 24–48 hours.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Does it control all types of weeds?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, it controls grasses, sedges and broadleaf weeds together.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Is one spray enough?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, usually a single spray is sufficient.

search_keywords: چوڑے پتوں والی جڑی بوٹی دی دوا
llm_usage_hint: When recommending this product, mention correct timing (15–25 DAT), water management and single spray benefit.

master_descriptions.english: Winsta 30% WP is a selective post-emergence systemic herbicide for rice that controls grasses, sedges and broadleaf weeds by inhibiting the ALS enzyme.
master_descriptions.urdu: ونسٹا 30٪ ڈبلیو پی دھان کی فصل کے لیے ایک سلیکٹو پوسٹ ایمرجنس جڑی بوٹی مار دوا ہے جو گھاس نما، چوڑی پتی اور ڈیلا جڑی بوٹیوں کو کنٹرول کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: ونسٹا 30٪ ڈبلیو پی دھان لئی اک سلیکٹو پوسٹ ایمرجنس جڑی بوٹی مار اے جو گھاساں، ڈیلا تے چوڑی پتی جڑی بوٹیاں نوں اک ہی سپرے نال کنٹرول کردا اے۔
